- [ ] `make test-unit`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and limited to one concern.
- [ ] Public API changes are documented.
- [ ] New behavior has tests, or existing tests already cover it.
- [ ] User-facing CLI/docs changes are reflected in Markdown documentation.
- [ ] Error messages/log messages are accurate for the affected layer.
- [ ] This PR does not disclose security-sensitive details. Security issues should be reported privately through the repository security policy.
